tests.name: 16Personalities (MBTI)
tests.description: The most popular MBTI-style test. Returns a 4-letter type plus 5 percentages.
tests.result: INTJ-A | 86% I, 63% N, 93% T, 85% J, 71% Assertive

tests.name: Political Compass Test
tests.description: Classic two-axis political compass. Returns economic (left/right) and social (authoritarian/libertarian) coordinates.

tests.name: Big Five IPIP-NEO (OpenPsychometrics)
tests.description: Free, research-grade Big Five personality test. Returns OCEAN percentile scores.

tests.name: Truity Enneagram
tests.description: Enneagram personality test. Returns a type (1-9) and wing, plus scores for all types.

tests.name: VIA Character Strengths Survey
tests.description: Identifies your top character strengths out of 24.

tests.name: Attachment Style Quiz
tests.description: Identifies adult attachment style: Secure, Anxious, Avoidant, or Fearful-Avoidant.

tests.name: Love Languages Quiz
tests.description: Chapman's 5 Love Languages. Returns ranked preference.

tests.name: IDRlabs Dark Triad Test
tests.description: Measures Narcissism, Machiavellianism, and Psychopathy traits. For self-awareness.

tests.name: Moral Foundations Questionnaire
tests.description: Haidt's Moral Foundations Theory. Measures Care, Fairness, Loyalty, Authority, Sanctity, Liberty.

tests.name: CliftonStrengths (Gallup)
tests.description: Gallup's flagship strengths assessment. Top 5 talent themes (free tier).
